required_preferences.fact: Strictly avoids all weeknight social activities after 8pm to guarantee uninterrupted pre-sleep routine for CPAP use, regardless of work demands

supersedes.fact: Limits social plans on weekdays to accommodate early work hours — avoids late-night outings

required_preferences.fact: Schedules urgent Paris-based client calls exclusively during early morning hours (before 10am local) to align with Paris mid-day — never after 5pm local anymore

supersedes.fact: Schedules all urgent Paris-based client calls after 5pm local — never during routine daytime hours

required_preferences.fact: Implements a strict nightly wind-down routine: no screens after 9pm, CPAP machine set up by 10pm, and lights out at the same time daily, regardless of work or family obligations
Strictly avoids dairy in all meals — checks labels and never orders creamy dishes at restaurants

persona: A bilingual helpdesk specialist assisting clients in both French and English
